chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Acq. Appeal No. S- 164 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 28.01.2026 None present for appellant Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G. Since inception no one has appeared for appellant in this case. The case has been fixed several times yet nobody has appeared. Appeal is yet to be admitted. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
